description: Labeled evaluation set for the multi-agent finance assistant. Each item carries the expected supervisor route. Document-Q&A items add a gold Wikipedia source (for retrieval metrics); Data-Analyst items add a deterministic ground-truth answer computed directly from data/companies.csv (for objective correctness).

items.query: What is a price-earnings ratio?
What does Nvidia primarily design and sell?
What is an initial public offering?
Describe Amazon's main business segments.
What is market capitalization?
What is an exchange-traded fund?
What kind of company is Meta Platforms?
Which company has the highest market capitalization in the dataset?
Which company in the dataset employs the most people?
Which sector has the highest total revenue across the dataset?
Which company has the highest net income in the dataset?
What is the oldest company in the dataset by founding year?
How many Technology-sector companies are in the dataset?
Which company has the highest annual revenue in the dataset?
What is Apple's stock price today?
What are the latest news about Nvidia this week?
Who is the current CEO of Tesla right now?
What were Microsoft's most recent quarterly earnings?
What is the latest US inflation rate?
What recent acquisitions has Amazon announced lately?
What is the current Federal Reserve interest rate?
